channel.title: Not getting job application form
channel.description:
Hey I am using https://www.npmjs.com/package/@awsmin/frontity-wp-job-openings package to fetch all the job listing in wordpress. But I am only getting the job description, there is no submit form for the job.
-->

item.title: Not getting job application form
item.dc:creator: OlenyaSraku
item.description:
I once waited for a job response for 6 months in total! That’s crazy, IMO.

Read full topic

item.title: Not getting job application form
item.dc:creator: avishekpandat
item.description:
hey this solution works.
Want to ask one more thing that how we can add the search filter on job listing page.
Thanks

Read full topic

item.title: Not getting job application form
item.dc:creator: anantajitjg
item.description:
Have you followed the Installation Requirements for the package?

To expose the form fields and other custom content generated by our plugin to the WordPress REST API, you need to create an add-on(plugin) for WP Job Openings plugin or custom functions added in the theme’s fuctions.php. You can develop a custom one by referring to WP Job Openings REST API plugin, or you can use the plugin as it is.

Read full topic

item.title: Not getting job application form
item.dc:creator: avishekpandat
item.description:
Hey I am using https://www.npmjs.com/package/@awsmin/frontity-wp-job-openings package to fetch all the job listing in wordpress. But I am only getting the job description, there is no submit form for the job.

→

Read full topic
